```{r tox vs. chemicals}
  group_by(chemical_class) %>%
  summarise(
    appearances = n(),
    avg_pvalue = mean(p_value_BH),
    sd_pvalue = sd(p_value_BH)
  ) %>%
  #add proportion and percentages of apperance based on the number of chemicals by class
  mutate(
    proportion = case_when(
      chemical_class == "Metals" ~ appearances / 7,
      chemical_class == "Phthalates" ~ appearances / 5,
      chemical_class == "Non-phthalate plasticizers" ~ appearances / 2,
      chemical_class == "Flame Retardants" ~ appearances / 5,
      chemical_class == "Alkylphenols" ~ appearances / 2,
      chemical_class == "PAHs" ~ appearances / 11,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_),
    percentage = proportion*100 / sum(proportion)) %>% 
  arrange(desc(percentage)) 
rank_top5_chem
```

```{r Vizualisation}

# Create lollipop chart showing top drivers with significance

#manual order facets
top_5_df <- top5_df %>% 
  mutate(
  endpoint = case_when(
      endpoint == "Biolu_inhi" ~ "Bacteria biolu. inhi.",
      endpoint == "BLA_OFF" ~ "Fish BLA_LOFF",
      endpoint == "BLA_LON" ~ "Fish BLA_LON",
      endpoint == "VLSR" ~ "Fish VLSR",
      endpoint == "VLMR" ~ "Fish VLMR",
      endpoint == "ASD_LOFF2" ~ "Fish ASD",
      endpoint == "TPZ_LOFF2" ~ "Fish TPZ",
      endpoint == "Survival" ~ "Fish Mortality",
      endpoint == "HR" ~ "Fish heart rate",
      endpoint == "ROS" ~ "Cell ROS",
      endpoint == "Viability" ~ "Cell viability",
      endpoint == "Op_time" ~ "Operation time",
      TRUE ~ endpoint)) %>% 
  mutate(
  chemical = case_when(
    chemical == "acenaphtylene" ~ "Acenaphtylene",
      chemical == "benzofluoranthene" ~ "Benzofluoranthene",
    chemical == "benzothiophene" ~ "Benzothiophene",
    chemical == "biphenyl" ~ "Biphenyl",
      chemical == "indeno123cdpyrene" ~ "Indeno[1,2,3-cd]pyrene",
    chemical == "BDE_47" ~ "BDE 47",
      chemical == "BDE_99" ~ "BDE 99",
      chemical == "BDE_100" ~ "BDE 100",
      chemical == "BDE_153" ~ "BDE 153",
    chemical == "BDE_183" ~ "BDE 183",
    chemical == "nonylphenols" ~ "Nonylphenols",
    chemical == "anthracene" ~ "Anthracene",
    chemical == "chrysene" ~ "Chrysene",
    chemical == "fluorene" ~ "Fluorene",
    chemical == "benzoaaanthracene" ~ "Benzo[a]anthracene",
    chemical == "benzoepyrene" ~ "Benzo[e]pyrene",
    chemical == "benzoghiperylee" ~ "Benzo[ghi]perylee",
    chemical == "dibenzoahanthracene" ~ "Dibenzo[a,h]anthracene",
    chemical == "naphtalene" ~ "Naphtalene",
    chemical == "benzoaanthracene" ~ "Benzo[a]anthracene",
    TRUE ~ chemical)) %>% 
  mutate(chemical_class = case_when(
    chemical_class == "Metals" ~ "Trace metals",
    TRUE ~ chemical_class)) %>% 
  mutate(endpoint = factor(endpoint, levels = c(
    "Bacteria biolu. inhi.", "Cell viability", "Cell ROS",
    "Fish Mortality", "Fish heart rate",
    "Fish BLA_LOFF", "Fish BLA_LON", "Fish VLSR", "Fish VLMR", "Fish ASD", "Fish TPZ", "Operation time"))) %>% 
  mutate(chemical_class = factor(chemical_class, levels = c(
    "Alkylphenols", "Flame Retardants", "Non-phthalate plasticizers", "Phthalates", "PAHs", "Trace metals"))) #%>% 
  #keep only the correlation coeeficient > 0.5
  #filter(abs_correlation >= 0.4)

top_5_df

p_lollipop <- ggplot(
  top_5_df,
  aes(x = chemical,
      y = correlation,
      color = chemical_class)
) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = chemical, y = 0, yend = correlation),
    linewidth = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = signif_BH), size = 5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.9, 0.9), breaks = seq(-0.9, 0.9, by = 0.2)) +
  
  coord_flip() +
  
  facet_wrap(~endpoint, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo", 
                        begin     = 0.05,
                        end       = 0.95,
                        direction = 1, 
                        name = "Plastic chemical categories"
                        ) +
  
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("***" = 16, "**" = 17, "*" = 15, "ns" = 1),
    name = "Significance (BH's adjusted p-value)",
    labels = c("***" = "p < 0.001", "**" = "p < 0.01", 
               "*" = "p < 0.05", "ns" = "ns")
  ) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(0.5, -0.5), linetype = "dotdash", color = "red3", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Chemical compounds",
    y = "Spearman's correlation coefficient (ρ)",
    #title = "Top 5 Chemical Drivers per Ecotoxicological Endpoint",
    #subtitle = "Positive values = increased toxicity with chemical concentration"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20, vjust = -4),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20, vjust = 0),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey70"),
    legend.position = "right",
    #legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.05, 'cm'),
    legend.box.spacing = unit(1, 'cm'),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18, face = 'bold', color = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18, face = 'bold', color = "black"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "grey70")
  ) +
  
  guides(
    size = "none",
    color = guide_legend(order = 1, nrow = 6),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, nrow = 3)
  )

p_lollipop

```


#---------------------

```{r operation time vs. chemicals}

# Resolve conflicts
select <- dplyr::select
filter <- dplyr::filter
mutate <- dplyr::mutate

# Define chemical predictors
chemicals <- colnames(df_PCA)[!(colnames(df_PCA) %in% c("FN", "state",
                                              "Biolu_inhi", "BLA_OFF", "BLA_LON", "VLMR", "VLSR",
                                              "ASD_LOFF2", "TPZ_LOFF2", "TPZ_LOFF1", "TPZ_LON",
                                              "Survival", "HR", "ROS", "Viability", "Op_time"))]
chemicals

# Endpoints
endpoints <- c("Op_time")

# SIMPLIFIED APPROACH: Use correlations + partial correlations
get_top5_predictors <- function(endpoint_name, data, predictors) {
  
  cat("  Analyzing", endpoint_name, "...\n")
  
  # Prepare data -----------------------------------------------------------
  df_analysis <- data %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(predictors, endpoint_name))) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()
  
  if (nrow(df_analysis) < 10) {
    cat("  Warning: Insufficient data\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Spearman correlations + BH correction ---------------------------------
  correlations <- purrr::map_dfr(predictors, function(pred) {
    
    cor_test <- cor.test(
      df_analysis[[pred]],
      df_analysis[[endpoint_name]],
      method = "spearman",
      exact  = FALSE
    )
    
    tibble::tibble(
      chemical        = pred,
      correlation     = unname(cor_test$estimate),
      p_value         = cor_test$p.value,
      abs_correlation = abs(cor_test$estimate)
    )
  }) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      p_value_BH = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")  # BH / FDR
    )
  
  # Get top 5 by |rho|, report BH significance -----------------------------
  top5 <- correlations %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs_correlation)) %>%
    dplyr::slice(1:8) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      endpoint   = endpoint_name,
      rank       = dplyr::row_number(),
      direction  = dplyr::if_else(correlation > 0, "Positive", "Negative"),
      signif_raw = dplyr::case_when(          # optional: keep raw stars
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p_value < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p_value < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE            ~ "ns"
      ),
      signif_BH  = dplyr::case_when(          # BH-adjusted stars (recommended)
        p_value_BH < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p_value_BH < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p_value_BH < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE               ~ "ns"
      )
    )
  
  # Simple standardized LM for effect sizes --------------------------------
  top5_with_lm <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(top5)), function(i) {
    
    chem <- top5$chemical[i]
    
    x_scaled <- scale(df_analysis[[chem]])[, 1]
    y_scaled <- scale(df_analysis[[endpoint_name]])[, 1]
    
    lm_fit    <- lm(y_scaled ~ x_scaled)
    lm_sum    <- summary(lm_fit)
    
    top5[i, ] %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        estimate   = coef(lm_fit)[2],
        std_error  = lm_sum$coefficients[2, "Std. Error"],
        t_value    = lm_sum$coefficients[2, "t value"],
        r_squared  = lm_sum$r.squared
      )
  })
  
  top5_with_lm
}


# Apply to all endpoints

top5_results <- list()

for(endpoint in endpoints) {
  cat("Processing:", endpoint, "\n")
  result <- get_top5_predictors(endpoint, df_PCA, chemicals)
  if(!is.null(result)) {
    top5_results[[endpoint]] <- result
  }
}

# Combine results
top5_df <- bind_rows(top5_results) %>%
  mutate(
    chemical_class = case_when(
      chemical %in% c("Ag", "Al", "As", "Cu", "Fe", "Mn", "Zn") ~ "Metals",
      chemical %in% c("BBP", "DBP","DEP", "DEHP", "DMP") ~ "Phthalates",
      chemical %in% c("ATBC", "DEHA") ~ "Non-phthalate plasticizers",
      str_detect(chemical, "BDE") ~ "Flame Retardants",
      chemical %in% c("tOP", "nonylphenols") ~ "Alkylphenols",
      TRUE ~ "PAHs"
    )
  )

# Display results

for(endpoint in endpoints) {
  endpoint_data <- top5_df %>% filter(endpoint == !!endpoint)
  
  if(nrow(endpoint_data) > 0) {
    cat(endpoint, "\n")
    cat(paste(rep("-", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
    
    for(i in 1:nrow(endpoint_data)) {
      cat(sprintf(
        "  %d. %-20s [%s] ρ = %6.3f, β = %6.3f (p = %.4f) %s\n",
        endpoint_data$rank[i],
        endpoint_data$chemical[i],
        endpoint_data$chemical_class[i],
        endpoint_data$correlation[i],
        endpoint_data$estimate[i],
        endpoint_data$p_value[i],
        endpoint_data$significance[i]
      ))
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
}

# Display the dataframe
top5_df

```

```{r Vizualisation}

# Create lollipop chart showing top drivers with significance

#manual order facets
top_5_df <- top5_df %>% 
  mutate(
  endpoint = case_when(
      endpoint == "Op_time" ~ "Duration of use (fishing nets)",
      TRUE ~ endpoint)) %>% 
  mutate(
  chemical = case_when(
    chemical == "acenaphtylene" ~ "Acenaphtylene",
      chemical == "benzofluoranthene" ~ "Benzofluoranthene",
    chemical == "BDE_47" ~ "BDE 47",
      chemical == "BDE_99" ~ "BDE 99",
      chemical == "BDE_100" ~ "BDE 100",
      chemical == "BDE_153" ~ "BDE 153",
    chemical == "BDE_183" ~ "BDE 183",
    chemical == "benzoghiperylee" ~ "Benzo[ghi]perylene",
    TRUE ~ chemical)) 

p_lollipop <- ggplot(
  top_5_df,
  aes(x = chemical,
      y = correlation,
      color = chemical_class)
) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = chemical, y = 0, yend = correlation),
    linewidth = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = signif_BH), size = 5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.9, 0.9), breaks = seq(-0.9, 0.9, by = 0.2)) +
  
  coord_flip() +
  
  facet_wrap(~endpoint, ncol = 4, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo", 
                        begin     = 0.05,
                        end       = 0.95,
                        direction = 1, 
                        name = "Plastic chemical categories"
                        ) +
  
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("***" = 16, "**" = 17, "*" = 15, "ns" = 1),
    name = "Significance (BH's adjusted p-value)",
    labels = c("***" = "p < 0.001", "**" = "p < 0.01", 
               "*" = "p < 0.05", "ns" = "ns")
  ) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(0.5, -0.5), linetype = "dotdash", color = "red3", linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Chemical compounds",
    y = "Spearman correlation coefficient (ρ)",
    #title = "Top 5 Chemical Drivers per Ecotoxicological Endpoint",
    #subtitle = "Positive values = increased toxicity with chemical concentration"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, vjust = 2.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, vjust = -4),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = "grey70"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.05, 'cm'),
    legend.box.spacing = unit(1, 'cm'),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18, face = 'bold', color = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18, face = 'bold', color = "black"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "grey70")
  ) +
  
  guides(
    size = "none",
    color = guide_legend(order = 1, nrow = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, nrow = 1)
  )

p_lollipop

```
